  • weekly picks (Mar 3 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 3rd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    1. s41467-026-70616-8 Flash joule heating-induced spinel-phase surface in Ni-rich layered oxide positive electrodes to stabilise lattice oxygen (Nature Communications)

    2. s41598-026-43414-x Preferential path attachment model for quantum key distribution networks (Scientific Reports)

    3. s41598-026-43306-0 Error minimized LO modeling of electric vehicle integrated off-grid microgrids using Taylor-Laurent series expansion and BBO based optimization under stability and steady state constraints (Scientific Reports)

    4. 2603.12280v1 Excitonic Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect in Collinear Magnets Without Spin-Orbit Coupling (arXiv)

    5. 2603.12309v1 Interaction-Driven Ferrimagnetic Stripes in the Extended Hubbard Model (arXiv)

    6. 2603.12313v1 Fracton Spin Liquid and Exotic Frustrated Phases in Ising-like Octochlore Magnets (arXiv)

    7. 2603.12316v1 Pruning-induced phases in fully-connected neural networks: the eumentia, the dementia, and the amentia (arXiv)

    8. 2603.12330v1 Parity and time-reversal invariant Ising spin ordering (arXiv)

    9. 2603.12336v1 Electronic correlations and dynamical screening with ab initio quantum embedding (arXiv)

    10. 2603.12338v1 Zero-field superconducting vortices and Majorana zero modes pinned by magnetic islands in correlated Rashba systems (arXiv)

    11. 2603.12355v1 Unified theory of orientation averaging in X-ray spectroscopies: understanding polarization dependence in a Cartesian tensor approach (arXiv)

    12. 2603.12362v1 Breakdown of Avila’s theory in the diamond chain with quasiperiodic disorder (arXiv)

    13. 2603.12413v1 First-principles study of doping influence on twin formation in Ni-Mn-Ga nonmodulated martensite (arXiv)

    14. 2603.12437v1 Ambient-pressure 151-K superconductivity in HgBa2Ca2Cu3O8+{\delta} via pressure quench (arXiv)

    15. 2603.12443v1 Advanced architectures for coupling III-V nanowires to photonic integrated circuitry (arXiv)

    16. 2603.12467v1 Annihilation of Dirac points and its topological obstruction in a photonic Kagome lattice (arXiv)

    17. 2603.12473v1 Real-time detection of critical slowing-down at the superconducting phase transition (arXiv)

    18. 2603.12474v1 Theory of hybrid defects, with coupled orientational order parameters, on flat and curved surfaces (arXiv)

    19. 2603.12481v1 Impact of currents on non-equilibrium coexistence in chemically driven mixtures (arXiv)

    20. 2603.12502v1 Ferroaxial magnets: time-reversal-even mirror symmetry violation from spin order (arXiv)

    21. 2603.12534v1 Polymer-Residue Accessibility Shapes Sequence Dependence of Critical Temperatures for Phase Separation (arXiv)

    22. 2603.12567v1 Accelerating materials discovery using foundation model based In-context active learning (arXiv)

    23. 2603.12570v1 Spectroscopic Studies of two-dimensional Superconductivity (arXiv)

    24. 2603.12603v1 Elucidating magnetic structure with optical dopants: erbium-doped Gd$_2$SiO$_5$ (arXiv)

    25. 2603.12692v1 Linear Magnetoresistance as a Probe of the Neel Vector in Altermagnets with Vanishing Anomalous Hall Effect (arXiv)

    26. 2603.12704v1 Elastoresistivity Signatures of Nematic Fluctuations in Layered Antiferromagnet CoTa3S6 (arXiv)

    28. 2603.12723v1 Torsional oscillation of carbon nanotubes driven by electron spins (arXiv)

    29. 2603.12731v1 Slow spin-lattice relaxation dynamics in YbVO4 revealed by extended thermal impedance spectroscopy from AC susceptibility and AC magnetocaloric measurements (arXiv)

    30. 2603.12732v1 Phonon-Induced Zero-bias Currents in Solids (arXiv)

    31. 2603.12745v1 Ab initio screening of quantum frustrated materials with kagome and triangular geometries (arXiv)

    32. 2603.12814v1 RF magnetron sputtering deposition of multilayers optical filters for ultra-broadband applications with a large number of thin layers (arXiv)

    33. 2603.12822v1 Optimized growth of large-size, high quality $\text{ZrTe}_5$ single crystals enabling clear quantum oscillations in electrical transport (arXiv)

    34. 2603.12839v1 Cell-induced wrinkling patterns on soft substrates (arXiv)

    35. 2603.12844v1 Many-body correlations in Floquet steady-states: Frequency-resolved renormalization group of the driven Anderson impurity (arXiv)

    36. 2603.12851v1 Continuous unitary transformations using tensor network representations access the full many-body localized spectrum (arXiv)

    37. 2603.12857v1 Quantifying Perovskite Solar Cell Degradation via Machine Learning from Spatially Resolved Multimodal Luminescence Time Series (arXiv)

    40. 2603.12898v1 Neutron-enhanced ion transport in cathode coating of Li-ion batteries (arXiv)

    41. 2603.12900v1 Photon-mediated entanglement between spin qubits beyond the dispersive regime (arXiv)

    42. 2603.12910v1 Tutorial: Heat Capacity-A Powerful Tool for Studying Exotic States of Matter (arXiv)

    43. 2603.12924v1 Orbital dimerization-induced first-order structural phase transition: a case study in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ (arXiv)

    45. 2603.12956v1 Dynamic charge oscillation in a quantum conductor driven by ultrashort voltage pulses (arXiv)

    47. 2603.13039v1 Noise-protected two-qubit gate using anisotropic exchange interaction (arXiv)

    50. 2603.13055v1 Topological electric field-defined quantum dots in bilayer graphene: An atomistic approach (arXiv)

    52. 2603.13071v1 SU(2) gauge theory of fluctuating stripe order in the two-dimensional Hubbard model (arXiv)

    53. 2603.13074v1 Band offsets in InP/ZnSe nanocrystals evaluated using two-photon transitions analysis (arXiv)

    54. 2603.13111v1 Putative quantum critical point in locally noncentrosymmetric CeCoGe$_2$ crystals (arXiv)

    56. 2603.13127v1 Out-of-equilibrium percolation transitions at finite critical times after quenches across magnetic first-order transitions (arXiv)

    57. 2603.13128v1 Nested Feature Spectrum Topology: Tripartite Topological Equivalence of Feature, Entanglement, and Wilson Loop Spectrum (arXiv)

    61. 2603.13219v1 First-principles predictions of band alignment in strained Si/Si1-xGex and Ge/Si1-xGex heterostructures (arXiv)

    65. 2603.11300v1 Many-Body Entanglement Properties of Finite Interacting Fermionic Hamiltonians (arXiv)
